_comment: Reference config for the EventBridge Scheduler rule. Actual creation is handled by deploy/deploy_aws.sh using the aws scheduler CLI. This file documents the settings.
Name: sec-edgar-daily-ingest
Description: Trigger SEC EDGAR Bronze ingest pipeline daily at 06:00 UTC
_notes: For weekly full refresh (run manually each Sunday):
EventBridge Scheduler passes the event time in ISO-8601 format.
The ingestDate is extracted as the first 10 characters (YYYY-MM-DD).
Note: EventBridge Scheduler fires at 06:00 UTC; SEC EDGAR daily index
for the previous business day is typically available by 05:00 UTC.
